visit_summary: Worth a trip if you confirm completeness and any minor wear with the seller first.
alignment_summary: The text description accurately reflects the items shown in the photo. The photo appears to be a real seller photo, not a stock image.

reasons.text: Colorful Peppa Pig cruise ship playset includes three character figures and various beach-themed accessories.
Plastic ship has multiple levels, bunk beds, and a fold-out side panel revealing a ball pit scene.
Set comes with a slide, lounge chairs, a table, and a pool.
The photo shows the Peppa Pig cruise ship playset with the described figures and accessories.
The item appears to be in good condition with no obvious damage or excessive wear visible in the photo.

seller_questions: Is this the complete set? Anything missing?
Any damage, cleanliness, or safety issues before I drive?
For motorized or music toys: does it need batteries or plug-in power? Do the sounds/motor work?
seller_message_draft: Hi, is this still available? Is it the complete set with nothing missing? Are there any damage, cleanliness, or safety issues? For motorized or music toys, does it need batteries or plug-in power and do the sounds/motor work?

Whether any electronic or sound features are present and working.
The presence of any hidden damage or structural issues not apparent in the photo.
